title: Thynninorchis huntiana
taxonomy: Thynninorchis huntiana is a species of orchid native to New South Wales in Australia. This orchid species belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Within the Orchidaceae family, Thynninorchis huntiana is classified as a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae. The genus Thynninorchis is further classified within the tribe Diurideae. Thynninorchis huntiana's classification is also supported by its unique characteristics, such as its small, white flowers.
